_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Determine scope, infrastructure, resources, and data sample size to ensure system requirements are adequately demonstrated.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI system documentation standards, including model cards, system cards, datasheets for datasets, and the evaluation evidence standards required for regulatory conformity assessment.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-002 (DA, cosine: 0.496), TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.493).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.9/10 (raw 0.386). Shared vocabulary: [system]. DCWF-only terms [adequately, data, demonstrated, determine, ensure, infrastructure] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, cards, conformity, datasets, datasheets] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.873, R=0.858). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 24-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Determine scope, infrastructure, resources, and data sample size to ensure syste" and "Knowledge of AI system documentation standards, including model cards, system ca" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.504 > STS 0.386 (gap +0.118). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [system] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.1%. Shared tokens: [system]. DCWF-only: [adequately, data, demonstrated, determine, ensure, infrastructure]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessment, cards, conformity, datasets, datasheets].
